headline: How Unanimous FDA Panel Support For mRNA Flu Shot At Moderna (MRNA) Has Changed Its Investment Story
summary: The FDA’s Vaccines and Related Biological Products Advisory Committee has unanimously backed Moderna’s mRNA-based flu shot, mFlusiva, for adults 50 and older, after phase 3 data showed it to be about 27% more effective than a standard flu vaccine. This endorsement positions Moderna’s mRNA platform for a potential second major commercial use beyond COVID-19, expanding its role in routine respiratory vaccination for older adults. We’ll now explore how this unanimous FDA panel support for...
